## 1. Admin Controller — qpaper Methods

Located at `admin.controller.js` (lines 96–131):

```96:131:d:\Scanning&Evaluation\api\src\modules\admin\admin.controller.js
  // Question Paper Config
  qpaperExams = async (req, res, next) => {
    try { return ok(res, await this.service.listExamsForQPaper()); } catch (err) { next(err); }
  };

  qpaperPapers = async (req, res, next) => {
    try {
      return ok(res, await this.service.listPapersForQPaper(parseInt(req.params.examId)));
    } catch (err) { next(err); }
  };

  qpaperConfig = async (req, res, next) => {
    try {
      return ok(res, await this.service.getQPaperConfig(parseInt(req.params.paperId)));
    } catch (err) { next(err); }
  };

  qpaperUpload = async (req, res, next) => {
    try {
      if (!req.file) throw Object.assign(new Error('No file uploaded'), { statusCode: 400 });
      const filePath = req.file.path.replace(/\\/g, '/');
      const result = await this.service.uploadQuestionPaperFile(
        parseInt(req.params.paperId), filePath, req.user.userId
      );
      return ok(res, result, 'Question paper uploaded');
    } catch (err) { next(err); }
  };

  qpaperSaveSets = async (req, res, next) => {
    try {
      const result = await this.service.saveSets(
        parseInt(req.params.paperId), req.body, req.user.userId
      );
      return ok(res, result, 'Question sets saved');
    } catch (err) { next(err); }
  };
```

**Five controller methods:**
| Method | Route (from `api.js`) | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `qpaperExams` | `GET /admin/qpaper/exams` | List all active exams |
| `qpaperPapers` | `GET /admin/qpaper/exams/:examId/papers` | List papers for an exam |
| `qpaperConfig` | `GET /admin/qpaper/:paperId` | Full config: paper + sets + scheme |
| `qpaperUpload` | `POST /admin/qpaper/:paperId/upload` | Upload PDF/image file |
| `qpaperSaveSets` | `PUT /admin/qpaper/:paperId/sets` | Atomically replace question sets |

---

## 2. Admin Repository — qpaper Methods

Located at `admin.repository.js` (lines 141–240):

```141:240:d:\Scanning&Evaluation\api\src\modules\admin\admin.repository.js
  // ── Question Paper Config ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  async listExams() {
    const [rows] = await this.db.execute(
      `SELECT ExamID, ExamCode, ExamName, ExamYear FROM Eval_Exams
       WHERE IsDeleted = 0 AND IsActive = 1 ORDER BY ExamYear DESC, ExamName`
    );
    return rows;
  }

  async listPapersByExam(examId) {
    const [rows] = await this.db.execute(
      `SELECT PaperID, PaperCode, PaperName, MaxMarks, QuestionPaperPath
       FROM Eval_Papers WHERE ExamID = ? AND IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY PaperCode`,
      [examId]
    );
    return rows;
  }

  async getQPaperConfig(paperId) {
    const [papers] = await this.db.execute(
      `SELECT ep.PaperID, ep.PaperCode, ep.PaperName, ep.MaxMarks, ep.QuestionPaperPath,
              ee.ExamID, ee.ExamName, ee.ExamCode
       FROM Eval_Papers ep
       JOIN Eval_Exams ee ON ep.ExamID = ee.ExamID
       WHERE ep.PaperID = ? AND ep.IsDeleted = 0`,
      [paperId]
    );
    if (!papers[0]) return null;

    const [sets] = await this.db.execute(
      `SELECT SetID, SetLabel, SetType, TotalQuestions, AttemptQuestions,
              MarksPerQuestion, QuestionRangeFrom, QuestionRangeTo, SortOrder
       FROM Eval_QuestionSets WHERE PaperID = ? ORDER BY SortOrder, SetID`,
      [paperId]
    );

    const [scheme] = await this.db.execute(
      `SELECT SchemeID, SetID, PageNumber, QuestionNumber, SubQuestionCode, MaxMarks, SortOrder
       FROM Eval_QuestionScheme WHERE PaperID = ? ORDER BY SortOrder, QuestionNumber`,
      [paperId]
    );

    return { paper: papers[0], sets, scheme };
  }

  async updateQuestionPaperPath(paperId, filePath, updatedBy) {
    await this.db.execute(
      `UPDATE Eval_Papers SET QuestionPaperPath = ?, ModifiedBy = ?, ModifiedAt = NOW()
       WHERE PaperID = ?`,
      [filePath, updatedBy, paperId]
    );
  }

  async saveSetsAtomic(paperId, sets, userId) {
    const conn = await this.db.getConnection();
    try {
      await conn.beginTransaction();

      // Delete existing scheme entries and sets for this paper
      await conn.execute(`DELETE FROM Eval_QuestionScheme WHERE PaperID = ?`, [paperId]);
      await conn.execute(`DELETE FROM Eval_QuestionSets WHERE PaperID = ?`, [paperId]);

      let questionOffset = 0;
      for (let i = 0; i < sets.length; i++) {
        const set = sets[i];
        const [setResult] = await conn.execute(
          `INSERT INTO Eval_QuestionSets
             (PaperID, SetLabel, SetType, TotalQuestions, AttemptQuestions,
              MarksPerQuestion, QuestionRangeFrom, QuestionRangeTo, SortOrder, CreatedBy)
           VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`,
          [
            paperId, set.setLabel, set.setType,
            set.totalQuestions, set.attemptQuestions, set.marksPerQuestion,
            set.questionRangeFrom || null, set.questionRangeTo || null,
            i, userId,
          ]
        );
        const setId = setResult.insertId;

        // Auto-generate question scheme entries from set
        for (let j = 0; j < set.totalQuestions; j++) {
          const qNum = String(questionOffset + j + 1).padStart(2, '0');
          await conn.execute(
            `INSERT INTO Eval_QuestionScheme
               (PaperID, SetID, PageNumber, QuestionNumber, SubQuestionCode, MaxMarks, SortOrder)
             VALUES (?, ?, NULL, ?, NULL, ?, ?)`,
            [paperId, setId, qNum, set.marksPerQuestion, i * 100 + j]
          );
        }
        questionOffset += set.totalQuestions;
      }

      await conn.commit();
    } catch (err) {
      await conn.rollback();
      throw err;
    } finally {
      conn.release();
    }
  }
```

Key behaviour of `saveSetsAtomic`: it wraps everything in a transaction, **deletes all existing** `Eval_QuestionScheme` and `Eval_QuestionSets` rows for the paper, then re-inserts. It auto-generates one `Eval_QuestionScheme` row per question (e.g. Q01, Q02…) with `PageNumber = NULL` and `SubQuestionCode = NULL`.

---

## 3. DB Schema — Question Paper Tables

### `Eval_Papers` (base schema + migration 002 additions)

```sql
CREATE TABLE Eval_Papers (
    PaperID                  INT           AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    ExamID                   INT,
    PaperCode                VARCHAR(50),
    PaperName                VARCHAR(200),
    MaxMarks                 DECIMAL(10,2),
    QuestionPaperPath        VARCHAR(1000),           -- added migration 002
    ModelAnswersPath         VARCHAR(1000),           -- added migration 002
    VarianceThresholdPercent DECIMAL(5,2),
    VarianceDecisionMode     VARCHAR(50),             -- Average|Primary|Secondary|Moderation
    SecondaryEvalPercent     DECIMAL(5,2),            -- added migration 002
    SecondaryEvalByTime      TINYINT DEFAULT 1,       -- added migration 002
    FOREIGN KEY (ExamID) REFERENCES Eval_Exams(ExamID),
    -- ... standard audit columns (CreatedBy, IsDeleted, etc.)
) ENGINE=InnoDB;
```

### `Eval_QuestionSets` (added in `docker/mysql-init/07_question_sets.sql`)

```sql
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS Eval_QuestionSets (
  SetID              INT           AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  PaperID            INT           NOT NULL,
  SetLabel           VARCHAR(50)   NOT NULL,
  SetType            VARCHAR(20)   NOT NULL,        -- Common | Mandatory | AnswerAll
  TotalQuestions     INT           NOT NULL,        -- M: total available in set
  AttemptQuestions   INT           NOT NULL,        -- N: to count (= M for non-Common)
  MarksPerQuestion   DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  QuestionRangeFrom  VARCHAR(20)   NULL,            -- display label e.g. "Q1"
  QuestionRangeTo    VARCHAR(20)   NULL,            -- display label e.g. "Q5"
  SortOrder          INT           DEFAULT 0,
  CreatedBy          INT           NULL,
  CreatedAt          DATETIME      DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  ModifiedBy         INT           NULL,
  ModifiedAt         DATETIME      NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (PaperID) REFERENCES Eval_Papers(PaperID)
) ENGINE=InnoDB;
```

### `Eval_QuestionScheme` (base schema, `SetID` column added in migration 07)

```sql
CREATE TABLE Eval_QuestionScheme (
    SchemeID        INT           AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    PaperID         INT,
    SetID           INT           NULL,             -- added migration 07 (FK to Eval_QuestionSets)
    PageNumber      INT,
    QuestionNumber  VARCHAR(20),                    -- e.g. "01", "03", "10"
    SubQuestionCode VARCHAR(20),                    -- e.g. "A", "B" for 10-A, 10-B
    MaxMarks        DECIMAL(10,2),
    SortOrder       INT           DEFAULT 0,
    FOREIGN KEY (PaperID) REFERENCES Eval_Papers(PaperID),
    CreatedBy       VARCHAR(100),
    CreatedAt       DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    ModifiedBy      VARCHAR(100),
    ModifiedAt      DATETIME NULL ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
) ENGINE=InnoDB;
```

---

## 4. DB Schema — Evaluation Details / Marks

### `Evaluations`

```sql
CREATE TABLE Evaluations (
    EvaluationID     BIGINT       AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    BookletID        VARCHAR(100),
    EvaluatorUserID  INT,
    EvaluationType   VARCHAR(50),                -- Primary|Secondary|Moderation
    StartTime        DATETIME,
    EndTime          DATETIME,
    TotalMarks       DECIMAL(10,2),
    IsSubmitted      TINYINT DEFAULT 0,
    SubmittedAt      DATETIME NULL,              -- added migration 002
    AllPagesVisited  TINYINT DEFAULT 0,          -- added migration 002
    FOREIGN KEY (BookletID) REFERENCES Eval_Booklets(BookletID),
    FOREIGN KEY (EvaluatorUserID) REFERENCES Users(UserID),
    CreatedBy VARCHAR(100), CreatedAt DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
) ENGINE=InnoDB;
```

### `EvaluationDetails`

```sql
CREATE TABLE EvaluationDetails (
    EvaluationDetailID BIGINT      AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    EvaluationID       BIGINT,
    PageNumber         INT,                       -- added migration 002
    QuestionNumber     VARCHAR(20),               -- changed from INT in migration 002
    SubQuestionCode    VARCHAR(20),               -- added migration 002
    SetID              INT NULL,                  -- added migration 07 (FK to Eval_QuestionSets)
    MarksAwarded       DECIMAL(10,2),
    MaxMarks           DECIMAL(10,2),
    Notes              TEXT,
    IsFlagged          TINYINT DEFAULT 0,
    FlagReason         VARCHAR(500),              -- added migration 002
    FOREIGN KEY (EvaluationID) REFERENCES Evaluations(EvaluationID),
    CreatedAt DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
) ENGINE=InnoDB;
```

The `SetID` column on `EvaluationDetails` is the critical link — the eval service uses it in `computeTotalMarks` to apply the **Best-N-of-M rule** for `Common` sets.

---

## 5. Web/src File Structure

```
web/src/
├── main.jsx
├── App.jsx
├── index.css
├── services/
│   └── api.js
├── components/
│   ├── Layout.jsx / Layout.css
│   ├── Header.jsx / Header.css
│   ├── CountdownCapture.jsx / .css
│   ├── FaceVerifyModal.jsx / .css
│   └── SessionContextModal.jsx / .css
└── pages/
    ├── Login.jsx / .css
    ├── HeadEvalLogin.jsx
    ├── VerifyOtp.jsx
    ├── ForgotPassword.jsx
    ├── ResetPassword.jsx
    ├── ChangePassword.jsx
    ├── Profile.jsx / .css
    ├── AuthPages.css
    ├── Dashboard.jsx / .css
    ├── Evaluate.jsx / .css
    ├── QuestionPaperConfig.jsx / .css   ← the admin QP config UI
    ├── AdminSettings.jsx / .css
    ├── HeadEvalAssign.jsx / .css
    └── TimeReport.jsx / .css
```

**36 files total** — no sub-folders under `components/` or `pages/`.

---

## 6. Existing Question Paper UI — `QuestionPaperConfig.jsx`

This is a **fully-implemented, feature-complete page**. Here is what it does:

**Selectors (Exam → Paper cascade)**
- Dropdown loads all active exams on mount via `api.qpaper.exams()`
- Selecting an exam loads its papers via `api.qpaper.papers(examId)`
- Selecting a paper loads full config: `{ paper, sets, scheme }` via `api.qpaper.config(paperId)`

**Document Upload card**
- Shows filename of currently uploaded PDF/image, with a "View" link that generates an authenticated URL
- "Upload PDF / Image" button accepts `.pdf,.jpg,.jpeg,.png,.webp`
- Calls `api.qpaper.upload(paperId, formData)` on file selection

**Question Sets editor card**
- Editable `Paper Max Marks` input
- Table with one row per set: Label, Type (`Common`/`Mandatory`/`AnswerAll`), M (Total), N (Attempt), Marks/Q, Set Max (calculated), Range From/To (optional display labels)
- N (Attempt) field is **disabled and auto-synced** to M for non-Common types
- Move up/down and delete row buttons
- "Add Set" button appends a new default set
- Live `calculatedTotal` vs `maxMarksNum` validation badge (green/red)

**Auto-generated Questions Preview card**
- Shows the Q01, Q02… chips that will be generated, grouped by set, with type badge (e.g. "Best 3 of 4") and set max marks

**Save**
- Validates `calculatedTotal === maxMarksNum` (±0.01 tolerance) before calling `api.qpaper.saveSets(paperId, { maxMarks, sets })`
- Refreshes config from server after save

**API client entries** (in `web/src/services/api.js`, `qpaper` section):
```224:236:d:\Scanning&Evaluation\web\src\services\api.js
  qpaper: {
    exams: () => request('/admin/qpaper/exams'),
    papers: (examId) => request(`/admin/qpaper/exams/${examId}/papers`),
    config: (paperId) => request(`/admin/qpaper/${paperId}`),
    upload: (paperId, formData) =>
      request(`/admin/qpaper/${paperId}/upload`, { method: 'POST', body: formData }),
    saveSets: (paperId, data) =>
      request(`/admin/qpaper/${paperId}/sets`, { method: 'PUT', body: JSON.stringify(data) }),
    fileUrl: (filePath) => {
      const token = getToken();
      return filePath ? `${API_BASE}/admin/qpaper-file/${encodeURIComponent(filePath.split('/').pop())}?token=${token}` : null;
    },
  },
```

---

## Summary of Key Relationships

```
Eval_Exams (1) ──< Eval_Papers (1) ──< Eval_QuestionSets (1) ──< Eval_QuestionScheme
                        │                                               │
                        │                                         (SetID FK)
                        │                                               │
                   Eval_Booklets ──< AllocationQueue               EvaluationDetails
                        │                                         (SetID FK, used for
                   Evaluations ──< EvaluationDetails               Best-N computation)
```

The `SetID` column threading through `Eval_QuestionScheme` → `EvaluationDetails` is what allows `computeTotalMarks()` in `eval.service.js` to sort marks descending and take the best N for `Common`-type sets, while summing all marks for `Mandatory`/`AnswerAll` sets.
